overall.description: First-person driving gameplay through a rainy industrial district in Cyberpunk 2077. The player navigates wet highways and underpasses with neon-lit billboards and industrial structures lining the route, transitioning from elevated highways to street-level industrial areas.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on wet multi-lane highway, approaching an intersection with traffic signals visible ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements on the left side of the highway
metal chain-link fence running parallel to the left side of the road
large concrete and steel overpass structure spanning the highway ahead
concrete divider barrier separating the lanes on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked industrial highway with the vehicle moving forward at steady speed. Digital billboards and chain-link fences line the left side while concrete barriers define the right. The overcast sky and heavy rain create a hazy atmosphere as the vehicle approaches a distant overpass.

events.description: entering covered underpass beneath industrial overpass structure
slowing for red traffic light at intersection before proceeding through

agents.ego_description: slowing down for traffic control signals and entering the covered underpass section

notable_agents.action: dark sedan waiting at the red light ahead of the ego vehicle

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal gantry with red and green lights suspended over the road
concrete underpass ceiling and support columns creating a tunnel-like environment
solid concrete retaining wall replacing the chain-link fence on the left side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered underpass where artificial lighting replaces the natural gloom. Traffic lights hang overhead as the vehicle slows for a red signal before proceeding. The environment becomes more enclosed with concrete walls and support columns dominating the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial highway with storage tanks

events.description: exiting underpass onto elevated highway section with industrial tanks visible

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the elevated highway section, maintaining speed alongside industrial facilities

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial storage tanks and pipes visible behind chain-link fencing on the right
concrete safety barriers along the edge of the elevated highway structure
highway direction sign suspended over the road indicating routes

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens onto an elevated highway with industrial storage tanks visible to the right. The road stretches ahead with concrete barriers lining the sides while rain continues to fall. The vehicle maintains steady speed following traffic ahead.

events.description: slowing down to follow a pickup truck through the industrial street network
navigating a gentle curve behind the pickup truck through wet streets

agents.ego_description: following a pickup truck closely through street-level industrial roads, navigating turns and intersections

notable_agents.action: gray pickup truck driving slowly ahead with brake lights frequently illuminated

entered.detail: large industrial warehouse building with corrugated metal siding and loading docks
tall street lamp posts with orange sodium vapor lights illuminating the road
wooden utility poles with power lines running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends to street level and follows a pickup truck through industrial warehouse districts. Street lamps cast orange light on the wet pavement as the truck ahead navigates turns. The environment features loading docks, chain-link fences, and utility infrastructure typical of industrial zones.

events.description: entering narrow underpass beneath industrial complex with reduced clearance
making a sharp left turn to exit the underpass area

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow underpasses and making turns to exit the industrial street maze

entered.detail: low concrete underpass with industrial pipes and conduits visible overhead
metal security gate and fencing for industrial facility entrance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow, covered underpass with low ceilings and exposed industrial piping. Artificial lighting illuminates the tight space as the driver navigates through the industrial maze, eventually turning away from the previous route and leaving the pickup truck behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway ramp with distant city skyline

events.description: exiting industrial streets onto elevated highway ramp with city skyline visible

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the highway ramp and cruising toward the distant city center with skyline visible ahead

entered.detail: concrete barriers lining the curved highway ramp on the left side
distant skyscrapers and high-rise buildings of the city center visible through the haze
illuminated commercial billboard with bright neon colors on the left side of the ramp

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto an elevated highway ramp with the city skyline visible in the distance through the rain. Neon billboards and highway signage line the route as the vehicle accelerates away from the industrial district toward the urban center, with concrete barriers guiding the curved path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked industrial district that transitions from open highways to enclosed underpasses and finally into a street-level warehouse zone. It begins on a hazy, rain-slicked highway lined with digital billboards and chain-link fences, moving steadily toward a distant overpass. As the vehicle enters a covered underpass, the natural gloom shifts to artificial lighting and enclosed concrete walls, momentarily slowing for a red traffic signal. The scene then opens back onto an elevated highway featuring industrial storage tanks before the camera descends to street level. Finally, the vehicle follows a pickup truck through a network of loading docks and utility infrastructure, where orange street lamps cast a warm glow across the wet pavement.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial underpass to an expansive, rain-slicked highway leading toward a distant city. It begins within a narrow, covered passage characterized by low ceilings and exposed industrial piping, where artificial light flickers across the tight space. As the vehicle navigates this industrial maze and turns away from a parked pickup truck, the enclosed environment suddenly gives way to an open elevated ramp. The scene then expands to reveal a sweeping view of the urban skyline through the falling rain, with neon billboards and highway signage lining the route. Finally, the camera accelerates along the curved path, guided by concrete barriers as it leaves the industrial district behind for the glowing city center.
